color_story: April foliage green (H:82°) at 8% saturation builds the entire neutral scale—never pure gray, always tinted toward spring. Sage cream (neutral-50) and warm stone (neutral-700) form the page. Spring green accent (S:62%, L:50%) at full saturation lands links and primary actions with real presence. Tigers amber (H:32°, S:60%, L:50%) appears only in the loss callout, wry and marginal. The waxing crescent moon (4.4% illumination) manifests as a global contrast restraint: body text at neutral-700 instead of neutral-800, reducing drama by 0.8 stops while preserving WCAG AA readability.
